label: Removed
items: The standalone Library screen has been retired — plant search now lives in the places you'd actually use it: Add Plant in the Shed, Add to your Shopping list, the Nursery picker, and Plant Lens. The full plant database behind all of those is unchanged.

label: Improved
items: Plants is now the fourth default tile on your quick-access menu — tap it to go straight to your Shed.
Tapping a Seasonal Pick now opens the same Care / Grow Guide / Companions / Light overlay you get from any plant search result, instead of bouncing you out to a separate page.
